data.name: Succubus Farm
data.detailed_description:
Play as a man captured by demons and forced to do manual labor. After some time, you can take no more and try to escape.

But that's easier said than done!

Avoid roaming patrols, hidden traps, and devious illusions in a mad dash for freedom!

Features:

  • A Dungeon Escape Action Game

  • Sneak Past Patrolling Demons

  • Avoid A Variety of Traps

  • Multiple Environments

  • Navigate the Labyrinth and Escape!
data.about_the_game:
Play as a man captured by demons and forced to do manual labor. After some time, you can take no more and try to escape.

But that's easier said than done!

Avoid roaming patrols, hidden traps, and devious illusions in a mad dash for freedom!

Features:

  • A Dungeon Escape Action Game

  • Sneak Past Patrolling Demons

  • Avoid A Variety of Traps

  • Multiple Environments

  • Navigate the Labyrinth and Escape!
data.short_description: A dungeon escape, action game. Play as a captured human forced to work for demons, but one day you decide to make a mad dash for freedom!
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and Dieselmine, All Rights Reserved.
